series_metadata.series_title: Community Based Family Resource & Support Program
series_metadata.series_description: Federal grant administered by the Children’s Trust Fund to provide community based family resource and support services to prevent child abuse and neglect. Files include copies of requests for applications, grant applications , grant agreements, scoring tools, award letters progress reports, invoices, HHS annual federal report, and related e-mail and correspondence.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 4 years following grant clossure and 3 years in the record center, thendestroy. ; Electronic: Retain in office 4 years following grant clossure and 3 years in the record center, thendestroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
